page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr7.24xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 96 dedicated physical cores and 96 vCPUs, utilizing Intel Xeon 8369HB processors operating at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, each vCPU maps directly to a dedicated physical core, ensuring consistent compute performance without resource sharing.

The instance is equipped with 768.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. This memory density makes the server suitable for memory-intensive workloads. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met through network-attached options. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and high memory density offer a predictable performance profile for enterprise applications, avoiding the noisy-neighbor issues of shared-thread environments. This hardware configuration is optimized for workloads such as large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, heavy data processing, and memory-bound analytics.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr7.24xlarge is a memory-optimized instance built on the KVM hypervisor and x86_64 architecture. It features 96 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369HB physical cores running at 3.3 GHz with a single thread per core, delivering predictable compute performance. The instance is configured with 768.0 GB of RAM, yielding an 8.0 GB per core memory ratio. It does not include local storage or GPUs, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. This resource profile is designed for memory-intensive enterprise applications, including in-memory databases, large-scale data processing, and memory-bound analytical workloads.

tagline: A high-density memory-optimized instance featuring dedicated physical cores and high network bandwidth for demanding enterprise database and analytical workloads.

768.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

Designed for in-memory databases, enterprise applications, and data processing.
